sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Thupha khuavak sungah, Zeisu tawh pai lai ah,
Eite paina lam hong taangsak hi.
A deih bang zuih ciangin, Amah tawh paikhawm in,
Athu ngai a muang a om ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Muang un,ngai un, Lampi dang omlo hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Van a gikte pua a, Gimna tawlna thuakna
Eite launa ding a, Dawimangpa hong khemna,
Zeisu thu ngai in muang leeng bei hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni liim ahih hang in, Meiikai ahih hang in,
Zeisu in thakhat a hawl khia hi.
Launa leh kihtakna, Tau na leh kahna te,
Zeisul muan lai in om thei kei.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Ki-itna pha tawh mah, Topa Zeisu mai ah,
Kikhawm ciangin lam pai khawm ding hi.
Thu hong piakna ngai a, Hong sawlna pai ding a,
Cik mah hun laulo in nuam ding hi.
